note.zh: 在本地通过 Grok Build（TUI）以 Grok 4.5（High，最高可选档位）一次生成，未修改。含 Perlin 噪声地形、WASD 第一人称、多种方块破坏/放置、水晶塔/符文石阵/龙骨遗迹/天空遗迹，按 G 传送地标，附小地图与快捷栏。
note.en: One-shot by Grok 4.5 (High, highest available effort) in the Grok Build TUI, unmodified. Perlin-noise terrain, WASD first-person, multi-block break/place, Crystal Spire / Rune Circle / Dragon Relic / Sky Ruins, G-key landmark teleport, minimap and hotbar.

note.zh: 在本地通过 Grok Build（TUI）以 Grok 4.5（High，最高可选档位）一次生成，未修改。海边骑行鹈鹕 SVG：渐变天空、太阳云朵、海浪沙滩、棕榈树、海鸥、自行车细节与鹈鹕喙囊羽翼踩踏姿态。
note.en: One-shot by Grok 4.5 (High, highest available effort) in the Grok Build TUI, unmodified. Coastal pelican-on-bicycle SVG: gradient sky, sun and clouds, waves and beach, palms, gulls, detailed bicycle, and pelican beak/pouch/wing pedaling pose.

note.zh: 在本地通过 Grok Build（TUI）以 Grok 4.5（High，最高可选档位）一次生成，未修改。Three.js 镂空机械表：齿轮系、摆轮游丝、擒纵、红宝石轴承、发光指针刻度、爆炸/组装视图、零件悬停标签与自动旋转。
note.en: One-shot by Grok 4.5 (High, highest available effort) in the Grok Build TUI, unmodified. Three.js skeleton watch: gear train, balance/hairspring, escapement, ruby bearings, luminous hands and markers, exploded/assembled views, part hover labels and auto-rotate.
